title: [BUG] wrapText and shrinkToFit alignment properties always true
author: PRR24
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

Lib version: 4.3 (also repro in 3.1)

## Steps To Reproduce

Load any Excel file and check cell's alignment.wrapText and alignment.shrinkToFit values

## The expected behaviour:

wrapText and shrinkToFit values match with the properties set in Excel.


## Actual result:

Values are always true.

comments.author: skypesky
comments.body: @PRR24 Unexpectedly, I failed to reproduce the problem you described. Can you provide me with a test? Maybe I can fix this problem

comments.author: PRR24
skypesky
skypesky
ArkYk
comments.body:
Hi sir,I have the same problem as you can see: 
source file:[aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/9027853/aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.xlsx)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/36286944/176869931-9ee64ed7-81e6-4adc-87c1-f0d529e27c92.png)
target file:[aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.xlsx](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/files/9027859/aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.xlsx)

![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/36286944/176869992-944129fb-779c-460a-b55c-98945597a3e6.png)

And about my program just read file and write file only.

```js
const ExcelJS = require('exceljs');

const sourceFile='/1/aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.xlsx'
const targetFile='/2/aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.xlsx'
const workbook = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
await workbook.xlsx.readFile(sourceFile);
await workbook.xlsx.writeFile(targetFile);
```
